channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: The Sanctions Switch: Zimbabwe as a Model for a New Approach
item.description: Two years ago, the U.S. government took an action it almost never takes and sunset an economic sanctions program that was past its prime. Why? Instead of sticking to the status quo, officials recognized that the program had become unmoored from any clear strategic purpose.
